subtasks.description: Query vendor reliability data including incident history, uptime metrics, and security compliance scores from SQL warehouse to generate vendor risk scores
Classify each vendor into low_risk, medium_risk, or high_risk categories based on incident history, reliability scores, and risk metrics; apply thresholds to generate risk classifications

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen at mid tier to query multi-table vendor reliability data with aggregation of incident history and reliability metrics; (2) cross_recon at mid tier to apply classification logic against the reliability data (treating the SQL output as the single source, cross_recon is the appropriate specialist for decision logic and classification). Both mid tier due to moderate complexity—multiple metrics aggregation and threshold-based risk classification logic. Not frontier-tier as no complex window functions or multi-signal ML inference is implied. Not small-tier as the reliability query involves multiple related fields and the classification requires reasoned thresholds across multiple risk signals.

output.sql: SELECT vendor_name, COUNT(invoice_id) AS total_invoices, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'overdue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_invoices, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'unpaid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid_invoices, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid_invoices, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('overdue', 'unpaid') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(invoice_id), 0) * 100, 2) AS incident_rate_pct, AVG(CASE WHEN paid_date IS NOT NULL THEN (paid_date - due_date) ELSE NULL END) AS avg_days_late, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_invoice_amount_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('overdue', 'unpaid') THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS at_risk_amount_usd, CASE WHEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('overdue', 'unpaid') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(invoice_id), 0) * 100, 2) >= 40 THEN 'high_risk' WHEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('overdue', 'unpaid') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(invoice_id), 0) * 100, 2) >= 15 THEN 'medium_risk' ELSE 'low_risk' END AS risk_classification FROM invoice_facts GROUP BY vendor_name ORDER BY incident_rate_pct DESC, at_risk_amount_usd DESC
